hooks.prompt: If the file being written/edited has a .scad extension, verify: (1) it includes <BOSL2/std.scad>, (2) it uses 'include' (not 'use') for materials.scad, (3) dimensions are in inches not mm, (4) no raw numbers for material thicknesses — use constants like MAPLE_PLY_THICK. If any of these are violated, output a brief warning starting with 'WARN:' describing the issue. If the file is not a .scad file or all checks pass, output nothing.
